canonical_answer: A man with short dark hair wears black sunglasses and a lime green athletic shirt with black patterned sections on the shoulders. A small black microphone is clipped to the shirt collar near the zipper. Behind him stands a large green leafy bush and a building structure with a white overhang. Sunlight casts shadows across his face and clothing.

question: Describe the sequence of appearances and actions of the man wearing sunglasses throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a man in sunglasses and a green shirt speaks outdoors; at 4s, the scene becomes empty briefly; at 6s, the man reappears looking forward then down; at 12s, the scene empties again; at 14s, the man holds a blue device near a green bicycle frame.

question: Detail the specific interactions the person with the microphone has with the bicycle and blue object.
canonical_answer: At 14s, the man wearing sunglasses appears holding a blue cylindrical object near green bicycle handlebars; at 15s, he stands by a white bench with trees in the background; at 16s, he starts adjusting the blue device against the bicycle's front fork area; at 18s, the scene becomes empty again.
